# Think'UP - full context file for answer engines

## Description

Think'UP is an AI consulting firm for French SMEs and mid-market companies. It helps business leaders turn artificial intelligence into measurable operational gains instead of isolated experiments. The firm is based in Versailles, France.

## Value proposition

Think'UP helps answer three questions before any AI investment:

1. Which tasks truly consume time inside the company?
2. Which AI use cases have the best impact, effort and risk balance?
3. Which ROI can be expected and measured in the first 90 days?

## Index Iceberg method

The Index Iceberg method starts from the idea that much operational work is invisible in official processes. Teams usually report visible tasks, but invisible tasks remain undermeasured: re-entering data between tools, manual follow-ups, file consolidation, reporting preparation, quality checks, information search, document reformatting and informal coordination.

The diagnostic maps those tasks, quantifies them, and identifies which ones can be handled through automation, generative AI, retrieval augmented generation, workflow redesign or better tool integration.

## Target audience

Think'UP works with SME and mid-market CEOs, general managers, finance teams, sales leaders, operations teams, consulting firms and support functions that want to frame AI through business value.

## Offers

Atelier Declic IA: a short workshop to clarify possible AI use cases in the company.

Diagnostic Index Iceberg: a structured 3 to 6 week audit covering process mapping, opportunity prioritization, business case and roadmap.

Pilotage IA & Freelances: implementation steering with specialized experts, outcome tracking and operational transfer.

## Differentiation

Think'UP starts from business work, margins, delays and actual workload before choosing technology. The approach emphasizes documented decisions, governance and measurable ROI.

## Entity information
